title: Mahindra Lifespace is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Mahindra Lifespace is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Mahindra Lifespace has an exciting opening for a Senior Property Advisor at our Varanasi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Mahindra Lifespace:
Mahindra Lifespace is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahindra Lifespace!
